channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Various Items of Rubbish and Broken Furniture Dumped on Path, 6th May
item.description:
Various items of rubbish and broken furniture have been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Garden Shrub Dumped on Turfed Area, 6th May
item.description:
An unwanted garden shrub has been left dumped on the turfed area. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Arthur Grove, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Amount of Rubbish Dumped on Path, 6th May
item.description:
A large amount of rubbish has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Arthur Grove, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Timber and Furniture Dumped in Raised Planter, 6th May
item.description:
Unwanted timber and furniture has been left dumped in the raised planter. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maxey Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken and Rusty Garden Furniture Dumped on Path, 6th May
item.description:
Several items of broken and rusty garden furniture have been left dumped on the path by the turfed space. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Villas Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various Items of Rubbish Dumped on Path, 6th May
item.description:
Various items of rubbish have been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ann Street, Plumstead

item.title: Dead Tree Dumped on Path, 6th May
item.description:
A dead tree has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Robert Street, Plumstead

item.title: Broken Furniture Dumped on Pavement, 6th May
item.description:
Broken furniture has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waverley Road, Plumstead

item.title: Car on road without valid MOT, 6th May
item.description:
Car on main road parked without a valid MOT MOT expired Feb 2026 Junction of Mottingham road and Leysdown road, Mottingham.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Mottingham Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Fridge Freezer, 6th May
item.description:
Please can you remove this dumped fridge freezer.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rossendale Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip of gas / substance cylinders in 2 boxes., 6th May
item.description:
Left here for over 1 week. Not usual waste, either building materials or other substances- perhaps nitrous oxide.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 163, Lower Camden, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on floor, 6th May
item.description:
Rubbish being left outside property attracting mice on road . homes need to keep rubbish in there bins and keep front of homes tidy to stop attracting mice which is causing a investatiom on road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mauritius Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds need removing, 6th May
item.description:
Weeds and rubbish in road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mauritius Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road has not been swept in months, 6th May
item.description:
Mauritius road has not been swept in months litter and fly tipped items in road . needs to be cleared and cleaned weeds removed sbc a regular road sweeper again to attend weekly as before
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mauritius Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gate left open, 6th May
item.description:
Gate at the bottom of Carlisle Walk / top of Cumberland left open for a few days / week now - perhaps from the waste or emergency services. Cars driving up the road where it should be pedestrianised causing safety issues.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Roseberry Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped giant nylon bags, 6th May
item.description:
4 huge giant nylon bags have been dumped in the car park area + some green waste
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Baltic Court, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street tree missing, 6th May
item.description:
The tree pit is empty and needs something planting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Styles Way, Park Langley, Greater London

item.title: Sign missing, 6th May
item.description:
The fire hydrant sign is damaged and missing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Styles Way, Park Langley, Greater London

item.title: Misaligned traffic lights, 6th May
item.description:
Misaligned traffic lights facing Southend Lane.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Lane, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Zebra crossing needs repainting urgently., 6th May
item.description:
Zebra crossing barely visible to pedestrians and almost invisible to drivers. Many reports of dangerous driving on and around this crossing. Person killed on this crossing, 18 months ago. Spend some money and make it visible, to avoid another death.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Theydon Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
